subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! The Face of the Wronged One hath turned toward thee from this spot which the heedless have made a prison for Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق قد توجه الیک وجه المظلوم من هذا المقام الذی جعله الغافلون سجنا لمن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
